privileged_info_summary: The run_simulation task uses 4StoreyBuilding.inp, a 3,258-line real multi-storey commercial building model with 4 floors and multiple thermal zones, sourced from official eQUEST training workbook examples. The task requires agents to run DOE-2.2 energy simulation using eQUEST 3.65 build 7175 (released October 4, 2018). DOE-2.2 will perform hourly simulation for a full year (8,760 hours) and report energy consumption broken down by standard end uses: heating, cooling, lighting, equipment, fans, and pumps. The simulation execution typically takes 30-60 seconds to complete.
